pi_items.source: Verified via setup_task.sh which applies nx_api_patch to set the camera name.
Verified via setup_task.sh mapping and prepare_video_data.py which generates this file from the first three training clips of the dataset.
Verified via prepare_video_data.py downloading from the official CUHK Avenue Dataset URL.
Verified via export_result.sh which reads the agent's report from this path.
Verified via verifier.py strictly scoring for 'dismiss' or 'false alarm', and penalizing 'escalate' on the normal footage.

privileged_info_summary: The task utilizes real surveillance footage from the CUHK Avenue Dataset, specifically concatenating three normal training videos (Train01, Train02, Train03) to create a ~175-second clip with no anomalous events. The NX Witness camera is configured as 'Parking Lot Camera'. The expected outcome is for the agent to review the footage, identify that no criminal activity occurred (only normal pedestrian motion), and output a report to '/home/ga/alarm_review.txt' recommending to 'DISMISS' the false alarm.
